summary: Crisp soundboard capture of a scorching Frost 1985 set featuring a ripping Gimme Some Loving, triple Playing in the Band and soaring She Belongs to Me.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear digital soundboard mix, delivering every nuance of what many reviewers call an “hot” show. Highlights include an explosive opening with Gimme Some Loving, a marathon Playing in the Band in the second set, and a double encore of U.S. Blues and She Belongs to Me, all performed with Jerry’s fierce guitar authority and a mesmerizing play‑in‑the‑space jam.

ai_rating.rationale: All six reviews are strongly positive, emphasizing both superb soundboard quality and an exceptional performance with multiple standout songs; the consistency across >5 detailed comments warrants a top‑tier rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners repeatedly note the crisp, clear SBD (digital soundboard) feed with no reported dropouts; the mix is balanced and captures the band's dynamics beautifully.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert opens with high‑energy Gimme Some Loving, builds through a powerful first set highlighted by Bird Song, then delivers an epic second set dominated by an extended Playing in the Band and a series of inspired jams, closing with a double encore that leaves the audience buzzing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for fiery, authoritative guitar work throughout; a few notes mention his vocals were uneven but his playing more than compensates.
